input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8600 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.plexus:plexus-archiver:2.6; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed javac failure is caused by existing test code calling the removed/renamed plexus-io API Java7Reflector.isJava7(), not by missing setup.

Upstream POM sets useJvmChmod=true for its own test suite, but on modern JDKs plexus-archiver 2.6 takes the Java 7+ file-attribute path before that legacy property matters; it is not required as workflow setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: plexus-archiver 2.6 is a local archive creation/extraction library; its POM declares the needed runtime dependencies transitively, and normal usage does not require an external service, Docker image, or additional test dependency before meaningful coverage is reachable.
